<!-- dignified-python-review -->

## ✅ Dignified Python Review

**Last updated:** 2026-02-23 04:43:35 PT

Found 0 violations. All code adheres to Dignified Python standards.

<details>
<summary>Details</summary>

### Patterns Checked
✅ LBYL over EAFP - All control flow uses conditional checks, no exception-based control
✅ Path operations - Proper `.exists()` before `.resolve()` and `.is_relative_to()`
✅ Exception handling - Proper boundaries at CLI and subprocess wrapper levels
✅ Imports - All module-level, absolute imports, no inline imports without justification
✅ Frozen dataclasses - All dataclasses use `@dataclass(frozen=True)`
✅ Function signatures - No 5+ parameter violations (ABC methods and Click callbacks are exempt)
✅ Subprocess handling - All `subprocess.run()` calls use `check=True`
✅ Re-exports - No `__all__` in changed lines

### Files Reviewed
- `packages/erk-shared/src/erk_shared/gateway/git/lock.py`: ✅ No violations

<!-- tripwires-review -->

## ✅ Tripwires Review

**Last updated:** 2026-02-23 04:43:10 PT

Found 0 violations across 30 files. No issues detected.

<details>
<summary>Details</summary>

### Tripwires Triggered
- Universal: subprocess.run pattern
- Architecture: Gateway ABC method addition
- Architecture: Gateway 5-place implementation
- Architecture: Time gateway usage

### Tier 1 Pattern Matches
✅ `subprocess\.run\(` - Found in packages/erk-shared/src/erk_shared/gateway/github_admin/real.py:214 (graceful degradation pattern, not a violation)
✅ `time\.sleep` - Found only in test files and properly using ctx.time.sleep() gateway
✅ `@abstractmethod` - New methods added to GitHubAdmin ABC with all 5 implementations verified

### Tier 2 Semantic Matches
✅ **Adding new method to GitHub ABC** - Verified all 5 implementations present:
  - abc.py (abstract methods: `get_variable`, `set_variable`)
  - real.py (real implementation with gh CLI)
  - fake.py (fake implementation with mutation tracking)
  - noop.py (no-op dry-run implementation)
  - printing.py (printing wrapper implementation)

None found.
